title: Supervise mushroom substrate preparation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise mushroom substrate preparation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Confirm requirements for mushroom substrate preparation

pcs.text: Obtain details of required quantities of substrate, dates and times to be achieved for each stage of the process, and inform work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain details of required quantities of substrate, dates and times to be achieved for each stage of the process, and inform work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain details of required quantities of substrate, dates and times to be achieved for each stage of the process, and inform work team.

pcs.text: Determine availability, quality, serviceability and cleanliness of resources required for mushroom substrate preparation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine availability, quality, serviceability and cleanliness of resources required for mushroom substrate preparation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine availability, quality, serviceability and cleanliness of resources required for mushroom substrate preparation.

pcs.text: Identify and apply site quarantine protocols, workplace and personal hygiene requirements, and food safety requirements for substrate preparation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply site quarantine protocols, workplace and personal hygiene requirements, and food safety requirements for substrate preparation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply site quarantine protocols, workplace and personal hygiene requirements, and food safety requirements for substrate preparation.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with substrate preparation, and undertake activities to minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with substrate preparation, and undertake activities to minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with substrate preparation, and undertake activities to minimise impact.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Confirm requirements for mushroom substrate preparation

elements.title: Monitor mushroom substrate preparation process

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor mushroom substrate preparation processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor mushroom substrate preparation processes.

pcs.text: Take samples of materials and outputs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take samples of materials and outputs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take samples of materials and outputs according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor and position probes to ensure representative readings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and position probes to ensure representative readings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and position probes to ensure representative readings.

pcs.text: Record production information required for Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record production information required for Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record production information required for Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP).

pcs.text: Report faults or variations from required settings or workplace quality standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report faults or variations from required settings or workplace quality standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report faults or variations from required settings or workplace quality standards.

pcs.text: Monitor compost, rooms and work areas for the presence of pests, and take remedial action according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor compost, rooms and work areas for the presence of pests, and take remedial action according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor compost, rooms and work areas for the presence of pests, and take remedial action according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Monitor mushroom substrate preparation process

elements.title: Finalise mushroom substrate preparation process

pcs.text: Monitor clean-up activities at the end of each process stage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor clean-up activities at the end of each process stage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor clean-up activities at the end of each process stage.

pcs.text: Perform routine preventative maintenance, and report faults according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform routine preventative maintenance, and report faults according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform routine preventative maintenance, and report faults according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean and store tools and equipment according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store tools and equipment according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store tools and equipment according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Record substrate preparation activities according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record substrate preparation activities according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record substrate preparation activities according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Finalise mushroom substrate preparation process
